error: Hit an error: {error}. Want me to try again?
Error: {error}. Let me know if you need help with this.
need_url: I need a URL to open. Where should I go?
Which URL? I need a link to work with.
Give me the URL and I'll open it.
need_query: I need a search query. What are you looking for?
need_browse_url: I need a URL to read. Which page?
Which page should I look at? Give me the URL.
page_unreadable: Can't read that page. Might need a login or it's down.
That page won't load for me. Could be behind a wall.
No luck with that page. It's either down or restricted.
file_confused: What do you need? Find, read, list, or open a file?
I need a bit more — what file operation are you after?
Be specific: find, read, list, or open?
msg_cancelled: Cancelled. Let me know if you change your mind.
msg_send_failed: Failed to reach {name}: {error}. Want to retry?
msg_confirm: Should I send this? Yes or no.
Send it? Just say yes or no.
msg_empty: That message is empty. Nothing to read.
It's blank — no content in the message.
Empty message. Not much I can do with that.
msg_read_prompt: Want me to read it? Yes or no.
Should I read that for you?
Read it out loud? Just say yes or no.
recording_started: Recording now. Say 'stop recording' when you're done.
Started recording. I'll stop when you tell me.
recording_already_active: We're mid-recording already. Stop the current one first.
Still recording from before. Say 'stop recording' first.
recording_not_active: I'm not recording anything right now.
There's no active recording to stop.
No recording running. Want to start one?
face_learned: Got it, {name}. That's {count} of 5 angles saved.
face_need_name: I need your name first. Say '{assistant_name_lower} this is' and your name.
Who are you? Say '{assistant_name_lower} this is' followed by your name.
Tell me your name so I can remember your face.
face_forget_who: Whose face should I forget? Give me a name.
Who do you want me to forget?
Which person? I need a name.
face_forgotten: {name} is gone. I won't recognize them anymore.
face_unknown: I don't have {name} saved. Can't forget someone I never learned.
No record of {name} in my memory.
notify_single: {sender} sent you a {service} message. Want me to read it?
You have a {service} message from {sender}. Read it?
notify_multiple: {sender} sent you {count} {service} messages. Want a summary?
{count} {service} messages from {sender}. Want me to go through them?
teach_need_step: I need at least one step. What should I do first?
No steps yet. What's the first thing to do?
teach_ask_trigger: What phrase should trigger this? How about '{name_seed}'?
What should I call this? Would '{name_seed}' work?
teach_saved: Saved. Say '{trigger}' to run all {n} steps.
teach_restart: Starting over. What's the first step?
Okay, fresh start. What's step one?
teach_yes_or_no: Does that look right? Yes or no.
Is that correct? Yes or no.
teach_cant_parse: Not sure how to do '{text}'. Try 'open X', 'press Y', or 'go to Z'.
Didn't catch '{text}'. Rephrase as 'open X', 'press Y', or 'type Z'.
teach_max_steps: That's the 20-step limit. Say 'done' to save what we have.
Hit the step limit. Say 'done' to finish up.
proc_list_empty: No procedures saved yet. Want to teach me one?
You don't have any procedures. Say 'teach me how to' to start.
proc_not_found: No procedure called '{name}'. Say 'list procedures' to see what I have.
Can't find '{name}'. Want to see your saved procedures?
proc_renamed: Renamed. Say '{new}' to run it now.
proc_edit_start: Re-teaching '{name}'. What's the first new step?
